title: Run record
description: Reproducible record of a single benchmark run. Frozen by chunk C02 for v1 chunks C01-C12; post-v1 schema evolution is owned by C13 via a versioned migration plan, not by in-flight edits to this file. The tool-action transcript and final repo-state snapshot fields are frozen here so C05 implements against them and C07 does not need to extend run_records.py.

schema_version.description: Schema version this run-record conforms to. v1 uses '1'.

run_id.description: Unique run identifier. Documented volatile field; not part of the reproducibility determinant set.

benchmark.description: Benchmark identity and metadata captured at run time.

model.description: Model/adapter identity. For file-based predictions, model.id records the prediction source (e.g. 'file:<dir>').

prompt.description: Pinned prompt used for the run.

rendered.description: Optional rendered prompt for a single-prompt run.

sampling_params.description: Sampling parameters (temperature, top_p, max_tokens, etc.). Part of the reproducibility determinant set.

seed.description: Sampling seed. Part of the reproducibility determinant set.

fixture_version.description: Version of the fixtures/cases used. Part of the reproducibility determinant set.

manifest_version.description: Version of the benchmark manifest used. Part of the reproducibility determinant set.

environment_hash.description: Deterministic hash of the execution environment (sandbox backend, runtime, OS class). Excludes volatile result output paths. Part of the reproducibility determinant set.

environment.description: Structured environment details backing the environment_hash.

metric_params.description: Verifier/scorer parameters in effect for the run. Part of the reproducibility determinant set.

verifier.description: Verifier configuration in effect for the run. Required at the run-record root with a name so every run pins the verifier that scored it; llm_judge runs additionally require judge_config.

judge_config.description: Pinned LLM-judge configuration in effect for the run. Required when verifier.name is llm_judge; the judge model, prompt, params, and seed must be pinned for reproducibility.

tag_filter.description: Tag filter applied to case selection for this run, e.g. 'smoke'. Null means no filter.

aggregate.description: Aggregate score over the selected cases.

allOf.description: Text benchmark runs must preserve per-case raw text output (observed) for replay/failure preservation.
Tool-task (or replay) runs must preserve per-case tool-action transcript and final repo-state for replay/failure preservation.
An llm_judge run verifier must pin judge metadata (model, prompt, params, seed) in judge_config so the run-record cannot validate without a reproducible judge configuration.

case_result.description: Per-case result. Raw output is text for text benchmarks, or a tool-action transcript for tool-task benchmarks.

observed.description: Observed model output. Text for text benchmarks; may be omitted when a transcript is present.

error.description: Verifier/runner error message if the case could not be evaluated; null otherwise.

transcript.description: Tool-action transcript for tool-task benchmarks. Fields frozen by C02; C05 implements against this and C07 does not extend it.

final_repo_state.description: Final repo-state snapshot passed to the state-check verifier. Frozen by C02.

tool_action.description: A single tool action captured in the run-record transcript.

cwd.description: Working directory relative to the sandbox root.

env_overrides.description: Environment variable overrides applied for this action.

stdin.description: Standard input provided to the action; null if none.

exit_code.description: Process exit code; null if the action did not run or was killed before producing one.

timeout.description: True if the action exceeded its timeout and was killed.

sandbox_boundary_violation.description: True if the action attempted to breach the sandbox boundary (absolute paths, symlink escapes, network, credentials).

violation_reason.description: Reason recorded when sandbox_boundary_violation is true.

repo_state.description: Final repository state snapshot materialized from the sandbox after a tool-task run and passed to the state-check verifier.

file_tree.description: List of file paths relative to the sandbox root.

commits.description: Commit summaries (sha + subject) in reverse-chronological order.

diff.description: Unified diff of the working tree against HEAD (or the relevant base).

current_branch.description: The current branch (symbolic-ref HEAD short name), or null if HEAD is detached/no branch. Optional for backward compatibility.

tags.description: Tag names present in the repository. Optional for backward compatibility.
